name: policy_sufficiency_judge
description: Evaluate whether governance policies are sufficient to cover the current goal landscape. Identifies policy gaps, overlaps, and conflicts.
intent: Judge policy sufficiency for the current operational scope

inputs.name: scope_id
inputs.description: Odoo record ID for scope entity

agentInstructions: Read all active policies and map them against the current goal landscape. Identify areas without policy coverage, areas with overlapping/conflicting policies. Produce verdict with evidence.
